results.text: Pierce Mbuyi - Stats, Contract, Salary & More - Elite Prospects. With give-and-gos and clever overlapping rush patterns, Mbuyi pushes his team forward in the neutral zone and acts as a fierce forechecker when he can’t find a play, attacking loose pucks, getting the interior position on them, and passing off the wall and to the slot. Pierce Mbuyi – 2026 NHL Draft Prospect Profile - The Hockey Writers. As one of the younger players eligible for the 2026 NHL Draft, he donned the “C” for the Ontario Hockey League (OHL) Owen Sound Attack and led them in point-scoring with a hardworking two-way...
